title: euphorbia suborbicularis
intro: Euphorbia suborbicularis, also known as the wheel cactus or wheel euphorbia, is a species of succulent plant native to South Africa. It belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family and is recognized by its unique, flat, and circular shape. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Euphorbia suborbicularis include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
